message:
refactor(ui): replace 9732-line legacy ratatui TUI with stub module

The entire ratatui-based TUI implementation has been migrated to the
FrankenTUI (ftui) framework in app.rs over the past month of work.
This commit removes the now-dead legacy code and replaces tui.rs with
a 4-line stub that documents the migration and preserves the mod.rs
declaration to avoid breaking the module tree.

The old tui.rs contained:
- Full ratatui rendering pipeline (search results, detail panes, tabs)
- Crossterm event handling (keyboard, mouse, resize)
- Syntect-based syntax highlighting
- HTML export modal
- Model download progress UI
- Semantic search integration
- 9732 lines of code, all now superseded by app.rs + ftui widgets

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
